file_insights.purpose: Parameter decorator for extracting current organization/tenant from request
Parameter decorator for extracting current authenticated user from request
Barrel export file for all decorators

patterns_discovered.description: All decorators extend routing-controllers framework using createParamDecorator and UseMiddleware
Authorization decorator integrates with CASL for capability-based access control
Both CurrentOrg and CurrentUser decorators enforce tenant context enforcement
Implemented numeric plan level comparison for subscription-based feature gating
Each decorator supports both simple and advanced options with sensible defaults
patterns_discovered.benefit: Flexible API with low barrier to entry

patterns_discovered.description: PermissionString type enforces 'resource.action' format at compile time
RequireRoles, RequirePlan, RequireAnyPermission, RequireAllPermissions as convenient aliases
patterns_discovered.benefit: Improves readability for common authorization patterns

gotchas_discovered.description: getPlanLevel returns 0 for invalid tiers, silently degrading to 'free' level
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Add explicit validation and logging for unexpected tier values

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Type casting for nested settings object
gotchas_discovered.description: organization.settings accessed as Record<string, unknown> requiring multiple casts
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Define typed interface for organization.settings to avoid repeated casting

gotchas_discovered.description: Code handles both TenantRequest and OptionalTenantRequest, mixing required/optional patterns
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Clearly document which endpoints require tenant context vs optional

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: CASL ability building on every request
gotchas_discovered.description: Ability is built on every request if not cached, potential performance impact with complex permission rules
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Implement ability caching strategy based on user, organization, and plan tier

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Error message exposure in permission checks
gotchas_discovered.description: Specific missing permission names returned to client, could reveal security model
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Consider generic error messages in production vs detailed messages for development

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created three shared decorators (@CurrentUser, @CurrentOrg, @Authorized) with comprehensive documentation and flexible configuration options
key_achievements: Implemented CurrentUser decorator with optional mode support
Implemented CurrentOrg decorator with required/optional variants
Implemented Authorized decorator with sophisticated permission, role, and plan tier checks
Created utility decorators (RequireRoles, RequirePlan, RequireAnyPermission, RequireAllPermissions) for common patterns
Integrated CASL permission framework for capability-based access control
Extensive JSDoc documentation with multiple usage examples for each decorator
Proper error handling with AppException integration
architecture_decisions: Used routing-controllers framework for consistency with existing codebase
Implemented plan tier hierarchy as array for easy extensibility
Supported both permission string shorthand and tuple formats
Made all permissions optional in Authorized decorator for pure authentication checks
Used factory pattern for middleware creation to isolate authorization logic

recommendations.rationale: Current implementation rebuilds ability on every request if not already present, could be expensive with complex rules
recommendations.implementation: Add Redis or memory cache keyed by user+org+planTier combination with TTL

recommendations.recommendation: Add rate limiting to authorization failures
recommendations.rationale: No protection against brute force permission testing or enumeration attacks
recommendations.implementation: Integrate rate limiter that tracks failed authorization attempts per user/IP

recommendations.rationale: Currently using Record<string, unknown> with multiple casts throughout
recommendations.implementation: Define OrganizationSettings interface in core/types with planTier and other properties

recommendations.rationale: Distinguish between authentication errors, role errors, and permission errors for logging/monitoring
recommendations.implementation: Create specialized exception types: UnauthorizedException, ForbiddenPermissionException, InsufficientPlanException

recommendations.recommendation: Add comprehensive unit test suite for decorators
recommendations.rationale: No test files included in this subtask
recommendations.implementation: Create test files covering all permission combinations, plan tiers, role checks, and edge cases

recommendations.recommendation: Create decorator usage guide with migration examples
recommendations.rationale: Help developers transition from inline permission checks to decorator-based approach
recommendations.implementation: Add migration guide showing before/after comparisons for common authorization patterns

recommendations.rationale: Current implementation only supports CASL, some use cases might need custom logic
recommendations.implementation: Add optional customValidator callback in AuthorizedOptions for business logic checks
